canonical_question: When should you use a system integrator (Accenture/Deloitte tier vs boutique vs internal)?
aliases: Accenture vs Deloitte vs boutique integrator
when to hire a system integrator
constraints: SI tier labels are informal, not standardized categories
Cost comparisons require scope normalization — Tier 1 firms often propose larger scope
Self-assessment bias is the most common failure point in SI selection
Tier 2 30% discount varies by geography, technology, and complexity
Cultural fit cannot be reduced to a checklist

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User selecting ERP vendor, not SI
User deciding iPaaS vs custom integration

related_to.label: Build vs Buy vs Partner Decision Tree
Build vs Buy for Enterprise Software

often_confused_with.label: ERP Vendor Evaluation (vendor scoring, not SI selection)

inputs_needed.question: What is the user's implementation context?
options: Deciding whether to use an external SI vs building an internal team
Choosing between a Tier 1 (Big Four/Accenture) and a boutique/mid-market SI
Evaluating SI proposals or conducting an RFP process
Assessing whether current SI engagement is the right fit
